Params: {3: 'On the artificial lawn of Babylonia\'s Central Park, warm sunlight filters through the dome above, while the laughter of children at play swirls through the gentle breeze.'}

{1: '1', 3: 'Amidst the park stands Rosetta, her silver mechanical frame half-kneeling beside a flower bed, aiming her camera at the tumbling children nearby. Her shutter clicks with precision, her movements as calculated as if she were targeting enemies on a battlefield.'}

{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Yes. Children are a symbol of vitality. I haven\'t been in Babylonia for long, but any place where children can laugh carefree must be a good one—these should make excellent promotional material too.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Just as she finishes speaking, a little girl suddenly appears in front of the lens, her chubby face pressed against the camera glass.'}
{2: 'Girl', 3: 'Miss, are you taking pictures of me?', 4: '15'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'The Commandant asked me to capture Babylonia\'s beautiful moments, so I\'m taking photos of you.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The little girl stands with her hands on her hips, eyes sparkling with excitement.'}

{2: 'Girl', 3: 'I want a photo with you! I\'ve seen you in the park before—you\'re Rosetta, right? That winged form you have, like a centaur, is so cool! Just like a warrior from a fairy tale!', 4: '15'}
{3: 'Rosetta gives you a look that seems to plead for help—the girl\'s energy and straightforwardness are clearly a bit much for her to handle.'}
{2: 'Go ahead and transform, Rosetta.', 3: '48', 4: 'Please grant her wish, Rosetta.', 5: '50'}
{3: 'Upon receiving your instructions, Rosetta takes two steps back and begins gathering energy.'}
{3: 'Rosetta\'s mechanical pegasus wings fold gently inward. As her metal joints emit a soft click, she rapidly transforms into her centaur form.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Girl', 3: 'Wow! She really transformed! That\'s so cool!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Girl', 3: 'Then, 【kuroname】, could you please take a photo of me with Rosetta?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Girl', 3: 'Of course I know! Mom and Dad always talk about you. ', 4: '2', 17: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Girl', 3: 'Oh, and Rosetta—can you please do that super cool pose? You know, the "hero on horseback, conquering Europe" one?', 4: '2', 22: '1', 23: '1'}
{1: 'Girl', 2: 'Of course I know! Mom and Dad always talk about you. Oh, and Rosetta—can you please do that super cool pose? You know, the "hero on horseback, conquering Europe" one?'}
{3: 'The little girl is probably referring to a pose from a famous painting.'}
{3: 'After hearing your description, Rosetta immediately begins to adjust her posture—'}

{3: 'Her front hooves plant firmly on the ground as her upper body stands straight like a human\'s. Her mechanical arm holds a lance resting against her side, her head slightly raised, silver-gray hair and metallic mane intertwining in the light to create a cold, brilliant gleam.'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Commandant, I don\'t think I can hold this pose much longer...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Girl', 3: 'I\'m ready, yay! Hurry and take the photo, Gray Raven Commandant!', 4: '15'}
{2: 'One, two, three, say cheese!', 3: '96', 4: '(Press the shutter—)', 5: '96'}
{3: 'You hear a familiar notification chime after pressing the shutter. Once the little girl confirms that the photo has been taken, she immediately rushes over.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Girl', 3: 'Lemme see the photo... Hey, I can\'t even see myself in this!', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'I\'m too tall when standing. The camera had to zoom out, making you appear too small in the photo...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Indeed. If I crouch down, I should be at her eye level.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Rosetta returns to the lawn to adjust her posture—gently lowering her front hooves to the ground, her massive mechanical body gradually lowering until her back is parallel with the ground.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Girl', 3: 'Wow! Can I lean on your back, please?!', 4: '18'}

{1: '1', 3: 'Without waiting for an answer, the little girl pounces onto Rosetta\'s silver-gray back. She grabs one of Rosetta\'s forked tails with her tiny hand and, after playing for a moment, suddenly pats the empty space beside her.'}
{2: 'Girl', 3: 'Oh! 【kuroname】 should join the photo too! I\'ll give you the spot closest to Rosetta!', 4: '16'}
{1: '1', 3: 'After setting the timer, you quickly walk back to Rosetta\'s side and gently lean against her warm back, just like the little girl did.'}
{3: 'Once everyone is in position, Rosetta adjusts her hovering wings, positioning them on both sides of her back like a protective embrace.'}
{3: 'The shutter sound captures both laughter and sunshine in a single frozen moment.'}
{2: 'Girl', 3: 'Can we take more photos like this please?!', 4: '16'}
{3: 'You take several more photos in the same pose until the camera\'s storage space runs low. Rosetta suggests transferring the photos, but just as she\'s about to stand up—'}
{3: 'She discovers that the little girl lying on her back has closed her eyes and fallen into a peaceful sleep. Rosetta immediately freezes, afraid to move a single part of her body.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'Let\'s let her rest then. By the way, Commandant... may I use the remaining storage on the camera?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Do you still want to take more photos?', 3: '160'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'I just want to record this moment of us being together, Commandant.', 4: '1'}

{3: 'She takes the camera and holds it above her head, flips the lens around, and presses the shutter. After the click, she lowers the camera to display the image: her centaur form lying docilely on the ground, a sleeping child on her back—'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'And you, Commandant, right by my side.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The entire image is serene and tender.'}
{2: 'Because children can sleep so peacefully here?', 3: '175'}
{2: 'Rosetta', 3: 'That\'s one reason. Another is that I get to spend such peaceful days with you, Commandant, and capture these everyday moments.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She then takes several more photos, only stopping when the camera is completely full.'}
